meaning: vt.转换,改变,改造,使...变形vi.改变,转化,变换n.[数]变换(式),[语]转换
examples: It was an event that would transform my life.
She actually wanted to reconstruct the state and transform society.
How do we transform one type of file to another?
The genre continued to transform throughout the following decades with the introduction (and later decline) of orchestras.
He also plans to transform the 28m-long ventilation shaft into a subterranean climbing wall.
